---
title: "Unit 7: Housekeeping"
html-math-method:
  method: mathjax
  url: "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/mathjax@3/es5/tex-mml-chtml.js"
format:
  clean-revealjs:
    self-contained: true
    chalkboard: false
    standalone: true
    slide-number: true
    show-slide-number: all
code-annotations: hover
bibliography: QMLS_Bibliography.bib
csl: evolution.csl
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    echo: true
---


# Question {background-color="#40666e"}

Would you rather have eyes on your hands or ears on your feet?


# Housekeeping {background-color="#40666e"}

- PC 1 Key
- Micropublication Data / topic due Tuesday after Spring Break
    - We will not have internet during the break
    - Sign up if you want to discuss (next Monday or Tuesday)

![](images/QR.jpg){fig-align="center" fig-alt="QR Code"}

# Complete vs. Incomplete {background-color="#40666e"}


# Questions {background-color="#f8c471"}
